data.title: Implement trailer injection path in apply-attribution-trailers.sh
data.description: Implement main injection in plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh. IMPORTANT exit semantics: use 'check_git_version || { echo "TRAILER_SKIPPED" >&2; exit 0; }' (exit 0 at script level so /dso:commit continues on git <2.6 per SC-7). Combine flags from format_trailer_flags + resolve_scalar_trailers. Call ${GIT_BINARY:-git} interpret-trailers --in-place "$COMMIT_MSG_FILE". Also verify blank-line separator is present before first DSO-* trailer in output (for SC-5 / Done Definition 5). AC: (1) populated JSONL + commit-msg -> DSO-Agent: line in commit-msg after running script; (2) SC-3: 2 distinct subagent_type -> exactly 2 '^DSO-Agent:' lines; (3) git <2.6 mock (GIT_BINARY) -> TRAILER_SKIPPED on stderr, exit 0, commit-msg unchanged; (4) blank-line separator present before first DSO-* trailer; (5) all T5b-test tests pass; (6) validate.sh --ci passes. SC-0: confirm 'git log --format="%(trailers:key=DSO-Agent,valueonly)"' would return agent names for a commit containing injected trailers — document this query in T9.
